category_sources: Official homepage says fprobe collects network traffic data and emits NetFlow flows to a collector.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project and homepage use the name fprobe.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge files page is the official release/download surface.
Official homepage is the best available official documentation surface and describes fprobe and fprobe-ulog.
repo_sources: Package source archive is an official release tarball, not a source-control repository URL.
source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project and homepage were found, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes libpcap capture and NetFlow export to a collector.
